name: Watermelon Sorbet
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and seed the watermelon and puree the flesh until smooth.
Should make 2 cups.
2. Combine the watermelon with the remaining ingredients in a large bowl.
Stir for several minutes until the sugar has dissolved.
3. Pour the mixture into a small container and refrigerate until it is no more than 40°F.
4. Pour the chilled mixture into an ice cream machine and churn until frozen.
